overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic waterfront promenade in a cyberpunk city. The player approaches a group of NPCs sitting on red couches watching television, observes one character standing up and gesturing, then continues walking past a roller coaster structure toward the water's edge with a distant neon-lit city skyline visible throughout.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade. A curved modern building with graffiti occupies the right side while a distant cyberpunk skyline becomes visible across the water. The camera approaches an outdoor seating area with red couches arranged on the concrete walkway.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a shaded lounge area beneath the building overhang where three NPCs sit on red leather couches watching a television. One NPC stands up and gestures animatedly while the others remain seated. Cardboard boxes and debris are scattered nearby, and the roller coaster structure is visible in the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with roller coaster and ocean view

approaching the water's edge as the railing becomes prominent in the foreground

agents.ego_description: walking away from the NPC group along the waterfront promenade toward the ocean

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the water
calm ocean water with reflections of the distant city

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the lounge area and continues along the open waterfront promenade. The roller coaster track runs prominently along the left side while the path leads toward the water's edge. The distant cyberpunk skyline remains visible across the calm ocean as the camera approaches the waterfront railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a futuristic waterfront promenade that transitions from a graffiti-covered urban walkway into a shaded lounge and finally toward the open ocean. It begins by passing a curved modern building on the right, moving across the concrete path as a distant cyberpunk skyline emerges across the water. As the camera enters a shaded overhang, the scene shifts into a lounge area where NPCs sit on red leather couches watching television, with one character standing to gesture animatedly amidst scattered debris. The camera then leaves the shelter of the building and continues forward, passing beneath the prominent tracks of a roller coaster on the left. Finally, the path opens up completely as the camera approaches the waterfront railing, facing the calm ocean and the glowing city skyline in the distance.
